label: Transparent bald eagle head motif
prompt:
Use case: background-extraction
Asset type: Morphous catalog motif cutout source
Primary request: Create a polished bald eagle head motif as an isolated transparent-ready cutout, facing three-quarter left, strong white head feathers, dark brown neck feathers, yellow hooked beak, sharp golden eye, dignified clear-governance character.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for background removal.
Subject: bald eagle head only, no body, crisp silhouette, natural but design-system friendly, realistic feather structure simplified enough to read at small sizes.
Style: premium semi-realistic editorial illustration with clean edges, subtle feather texture, no outline stroke, no cast shadow.
Composition: centered subject with generous padding on all sides, full head visible, no cropping.
Color constraints: use white head, warm dark brown feathers, yellow beak and eye; do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Avoid: text, watermark, logo, badge, scenery, branch, flag, stars, gradients in background, shadows, reflections, floor plane, random brand names.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board for Bald Eagle
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a motif-driven UI theme named "Bald Eagle", derived from a bald eagle head: white head feathers, deep brown body feathers, yellow beak and eye accents, river forest neutrals, and a clear governance system mood.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 high-resolution 4K-class board intended final use at 3840x2160. Use a precise product-design grid with large readable labels.
Mood and UI language: clear governance dashboard, accountable civic operations, crisp hierarchy, confident but restrained, feather-edge dividers, river-stone surfaces, forest-brown ink, beak-yellow decision accents, white-head clarity panels, 8px radius cards, shadcn/tweakcn-style controls.
Required visible sections: title "Bald Eagle", motif story, palette swatches, typography with English and Japanese examples, left navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, data table, policy review form, search/command bar, tabs, buttons, badges, alerts, status chips, checkbox/radio/switch controls, loading/empty/error states, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, CSS token snippets, texture strip, generated asset examples.
Specific governance labels: Oversight, Policy Queue, Reviews, Cases, Compliance, Audit Trail, Risk Index, Approved, Pending, Escalated, Hearing Date, Owner, Decision, Notes.
Palette: clear white and warm ivory backgrounds, dark eagle brown text and panels, forest bark borders, river mist muted areas, yellow beak primary/accent, golden eye chart color, evergreen secondary, clay red destructive only for errors.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs. No random company names or brand names.
Constraints: no watermark, no logos, no flag imagery, no stars-and-stripes theme, no unrelated saturated colors, no purple/blue gradients, no illegible microtext, no marketing hero layout.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board for Bald Eagle
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode version of the "Bald Eagle" design-system board. It must feel like the same clear governance system translated to dark mode, derived from a bald eagle head: white head feather highlights, deep brown feather panels, yellow beak and eye accents, river forest neutrals.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 high-resolution 4K-class board intended final use at 3840x2160. Use a precise product-design grid with large readable labels.
Mood and UI language: dark clear-governance dashboard, accountable civic operations, crisp hierarchy, confident but restrained, feather-edge dividers, deep river-forest workspace, brown feather panels, ivory clarity text, beak-yellow decision accents, 8px radius cards, shadcn/tweakcn-style controls.
Required visible sections: title "Bald Eagle Dark", motif story, dark palette swatches, typography with English and Japanese examples, left navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, data table, policy review form, search/command bar, tabs, buttons, badges, alerts, status chips, checkbox/radio/switch controls, loading/empty/error states, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, CSS token snippets, texture strip, generated asset examples.
Specific governance labels: Oversight, Policy Queue, Reviews, Cases, Compliance, Audit Trail, Risk Index, Approved, Pending, Escalated, Hearing Date, Owner, Decision, Notes.
Palette: deep umber and river-night background, dark eagle brown panels, ivory white-head text, yellow beak primary/accent, golden eye chart color, evergreen secondary, river mist borders, clay red destructive only for errors.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs. No random company names or brand names.
Constraints: no watermark, no logos, no flag imagery, no stars-and-stripes theme, no neon colors, no pure black flat background, no unrelated saturated colors, no purple/blue gradients, no illegible microtext, no marketing hero layout.
